summary: Wave 1: Typography & Icon System — Public Sans (headlines) + Lexend (body)
No font weights below 400 (elderly patients accessibility, WCAG 2.1 AA)
All lucide-react icons must be paired with text labels (accessibility requirement)
Light/thin font weights all map to 400 (regular) for geriatric readability
lucide-react v1.0.1 installed and icon mapping created for all app features
Icon size standards: 28px for nav, 24px for base components
Dashboard Hoje redesign with calendar view, adherence summary, quick actions for medicines/adherence
Treatments view: CRUD protocol form, wizard for protocol creation, compliance tracking, color-coded status
Treatments Wave 7 required 7 sprints and included 10 critical fixes for protocol management
Stock Redesign: purchases, inventory tracking, consumption FIFO, expiry alerts, refill predictions
Profile Hub (account, health info, emergency), Health History with calendar-driven navigation
Settings extracted to independent view with modular configuration management
Profile Hub consolidation with complete user data migration from legacy views
